title: ophrys oestrifera subsp. cornutula
intro: Ophrys oestrifera subsp. cornutula, also known as the bee orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with bee orchid include reducing fever, soothing digestive problems, and alleviating respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
